entry.title: How to change index columns using VBScript?
entry.content:
Hi!

I need to remove incorrectly loaded data on expression of index columns.

I started the VBScript bellow but when the expression is altered to empty, the code is altered to empty too. Is there a way to change this?

Thanks in advance.

Set Mdl = ActiveModel

For Each t In Mdl.Tables
     'Indexes
    For Each i In t.Indexes
        
        For Each io In i.IndexColumns
            
            Dim auxValue, auxICol
            
            auxValue = Trim(io.Expression)
            
            If auxValue <> "" Then
                Output i.Code + "." + io.Code
                auxICol = io.Code
                io.Expression = ""
                ' Error
                'io.Code = auxICol
                'io.Delete
            End If
        Next
        
    Next
Next

 SAP PowerDesigner

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm Sairaj, a Computer Engineering student deeply grateful for the invaluable opportunity provided by SAP.

This certification isn't just a badge on my resume; it signifies a pivotal moment in my journey. It opens doors to countless opportunities, shaping my future and aligning with my aspirations.

I want to express my sincere appreciation for your belief in students like me. Your investment in our potential ensures a brighter future filled with possibilities.

Warm regards,
Sairaj

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Foundry Job Scheduler - Configuration
entry.content: For configuring your Job Scheduler to trigger different environment URLs dynamically, use environment-specific variables or configuration files to manage development, quality, and production URLs. Yes, you can specify REST API details meant for the Job Scheduler in the MTA.yaml file, ensuring sensitive details are secured. To schedule a job at a specific time, like 10 PM daily, include the correct cron expression in your MTA.yaml file, for example, "0 22 * * *". For further assistance and community support, consider utilizing resources such as the 91 club app, where you can exchange insights and get advice on similar technical setups

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Break Fix for Productive Processes?
entry.content:
We have an SAP Cloud ALM customer who is working in multiple releases and have been setting Processes to Production once they have gone-live. See below.

The question they have now, is when it comes time for Break-Fix (after Go-Live), should they be removing these processes from the earlier scope? They ask, because when logging Requirements, Test Cases, User Stories, Tasks, etc. if they are logged against the Processes under a specific Scope, they will appear under the previous Scope (1.1 for example). They would prefer they be logged as "Break-Fix" and not part of a previous Scope.

After Go-Live, do other customers create a Scope specifically for Break-Fix and include the same Processes? Or is there another way to handle processes which are Productive so as to include Requirements, Test Cases, etc. as NOT being tied to the previous Scopes? 

Thank you for the feedback!

entry.title: Created by and changed by not auto filled by RAP framework managed scenario
entry.content:
Created by and changed by not auto filled by RAP framework managed scenario
Below is my table:

define table zmt_ref {

key mandt : mandt not null;

key id : zid not null;

key subid : zsubid not null;

key rgn : z_rgn not null;

@AbapCatalog.foreignKey.screenCheck : true

key partner : bu_partner not null

with foreign key but000

where client = zmt_ref.mandt

and partner = zmt_ref.partner;

change_no : change_no;

include zys_change_log;

 

}

define structure zys_change_log {

zzernam : ernam;

zzerdat : erdat;

zzerzet : erzet;

zzaenam : aenam;

zzaedat : aedat;

zzaezet : aezet;

zzlvorm : lvorm;

 

}

I have defined Semantic anotation ay interface view level:

@Semantics.user.createdBy: true

zzernam as CreatedBy,

@Semantics.systemDate.createdAt: true

zzerdat as CreatedOn,

@Semantics.systemTime.createdAt: true

zzerzet as CreatedAt,

@Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true

zzaenam as ChangedBy,

@Semantics.systemDate.lastChangedAt: true

zzaedat as ChangedOn,

@Semantics.systemTime.lastChangedAt: true

zzaezet as ChangedAt,

 

Also mapping is defined in behaviour defition:

managed implementation in class zcl_test_i_ref unique;

strict;

 

define behavior for Ztest_i_ref alias idToVendorMap

persistent table zmt_ref

lock master

authorization master ( instance )

etag master ChangedAt

{

create ( precheck );

update ( precheck );

delete;

 

field ( readonly ) CreatedBy, CreatedAt, CreatedOn, ChangedBy, ChangedAt, ChangedOn, Deleted;

field ( mandatory : create ) id, subid, rgn;

field ( readonly : update ) id, subid, rgn, Partner;

 

 

action ( features : instance ) deleteMapping result [1] $self;

action ( features : instance ) undeleteMapping result [1] $self;

 

 

validation validatePartner on save { field Partner; create; update; }

validation validatergn on save { field rgn; create; update; }

validation validateChangeRequest on save { field ChangeRequest; create; update; }

 

mapping for zmt_ref

{

id = id;

subid = subid;

rgn = rgn;

Partner = partner;

ChangeRequest = change_no;

CreatedBy = zzernam;

CreatedOn = zzerdat;

CreatedAt = zzerzet;

ChangedBy = zzaenam;

ChangedOn = zzaedat;

ChangedAt = zzaezet;

Deleted = zzlvorm;

}

 

}

still RAP framework is not updating Created By and changed by, for created AT and changed AT i understand i do not have datatype needed by RAP but it shuould update username fields,

Please advise.

I am trying to use KSB1 display template from SAP Business Automation store. i was able to proceed initial steps however ended up with below error ( in step Screen Switch ).

i am not sure how to rectify , since the screen switch step or the baove one is not working i guess.

any pointers will be helpful.

@Chaitanya_Priya : any insight to debug what is missing ? i am using ready to use template from the store .

entry.title: Re: Setting up IAS for SAP Support access
entry.content: Allow Identity Authentication Users Log On Option is supported for SAML 2.0 applications only., what options are available when OpenID is used instead of SAML for establishing trust with IAS

entry.title: Asset posting not working on HANA - AFAB
entry.content:
Hi team

The depreciation run in S4 Hana is not working correctly. According to our posting cycle which is monthly we should only be able to post to the next posting cycle. When I run depreciation for any other period it allows me to do so. The system should only allow me to post depreciation for the next period and should have given the error message “According to posting cycle, you should post period 000 next”.  We should only be allowed to post the next simultaneous period from last depreciation posting period.  

My posting rule is configured like this:

Is this normal behaivour on HANA for assets on AFAB tcode, or Im missing some configuration?

entry.title: SAP Business Process Analyst II/III
entry.content:
Description

 

Under general supervision of the Supervisor, Business Systems Support provides support of automated solutions for SAP and associated business processes. Serves as the critical link between the user department and IT staff – ensuring user requirements are understood, communicated, and acted upon appropriately. Support provided includes serving as a journeyman-level knowledge resource for system end-users; monitoring system operations and performance; troubleshooting system problems; and identifying, designing, and implementing resolutions to system problems and enhancements.

 

 

Examples of Duties

This is a Hybrid position with up to 2 days of telework after 90 days of employment.
Applicants must be authorized to work for ANY employer in the U.S. We are unable to sponsor employment Visa. 

Provides mid-level production and system maintenance support of automated solutions, as described below:

  • Production Support
    1. Serves as a journeyman-level system and process knowledge resource.
    2. Monitors and analyzes business operations and system performance.
    3. Identifies, analyzes, and defines system and process problems, documenting the requirements of all involved groups.
    4. Develops a course of action to resolve problems, working closely with other IT staff, user departments, and product vendors, as needed.
    5. Recommends and implements problem resolutions, whether a system change request, software upgrade request, business work-around, or business process change.
    6. Assesses the impact of problems and their resolution and recommends an appropriate priority.
    7. Notifies end users of system problems and changes.
    8. Works on special projects, as assigned.
  • System Maintenance
    1. Keeps up-to-date on system features and upgrades.
    2. Assists in short- and long-term technology planning and in assessing the impact of technology upgrades.
    3. Evaluates and recommends system enhancements.
    4. Develops functional specifications for system enhancements and modifications.
    5. Designs processes, reports, forms, and system features, obtaining the appropriate approvals from the management of affected departments.
    6. Implements and maintains system configuration to support functional designs.
    7. Plans, schedules, and monitors the development and testing of software modifications/ changes, adjusting work to achieve desired outcomes.
    8. Maintains system support documentation.
    9. Performs unit testing on configuration work.
      1. Plans and performs integration and regression testing for system changes.
      2. Creates and maintains test and training data.
      3. Develops briefings and other documentation, as appropriate, for system changes.
    10. Oversees systems development activities by:
      1. Serving as a Team Lead on large, complex projects.
      2. Performing as a Project Manager on small projects.
      3. Providing training, guidance, and assistance to less experienced Business Analysts.
      • Performs other duties as assigned or required.

 

Typical Qualifications

 

  • Possession of an associate degree in computer science, information systems, business, or related field, and four (4) years of analysis experience in a complex information systems environment or any equivalent combination of education, experience, training and knowledge.
  • Minimum of six years of hands-on experience working with SAP ERP
  • Experience IS-U related functions and related systems- Customer Care & Service (CCS), Financial & Contract Account (FI-CA), Device management, SAP Rates and Invoicing
  • Experience with C4C (V1) and/or S/4HANA 2022 preferred.
  • Experience with requirements, elicitation, analysis, and documentation
  • Experience with business analysis, quality assurance, and workflow tools and/or practices
  • Experience with business case development and presentation
  • Experience in providing technology solution assessment and validation.
  • Demonstrated ability to participate in projects/assignments with varying levels of complexity.
  • Possess the skills to initiate, evaluate, develop, and influence users on adoption of solid, actionable recommendations.
  • Experienced in leading, designing, and facilitating multiples concurrent projects and delivering effective presentations that are valued by customers.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
  • Must pass a controlled substance (drug) test for employment.  
Agency Fairfax Water
Address 8570 Executive Park Avenue

Fairfax, Virginia, 22031
Phone 703-289-6110 Website: http://agency.governmentjobs.com/fairfaxwater/default.cfm Apply: https://www.governmentjobs.com/careers/fairfaxwater/jobs/4432868/business-process-analyst-ii-iii/apply?pagetype=jobOpportunitiesJobs

entry.title: Re: SAP RAR certification
entry.content:
Hello,
No certification and no other learner recognition is planned for RAR today.
Best regards, Doris Lindauer
Learning Portfolio Manager for Finance, SAP SE

entry.title: Basic Withholding Tax (for customers) Process
entry.content:
Hello - We are in the USA and have foreign customers who withhold tax from their payments on our invoices. This causes them to pay less than we have invoiced.

I am looking for a basic best practice guide to handle this in the system.  Should tax codes be set up for these (countries, customers, materials?) so that the tax is recognized, and the amount sitting in A/R will match the payment when it comes in?

Do we not do any such configuration, and there is a method to post the short payment, and any difference to withholding tax to clear the item?  

I have struggled to find any clear documentation in the help. Most seems to speak about supplier side withholding tax, or already be deep into complexities - just looking for the basic initial setup and best practice process.

entry.title: sap gui - Double focusChange event
entry.content:
I Call the func FocusChange event And it doesn't work

its call to func many times for each focus
example
I focus in the X field,
its comes to the function several times instead one time
what is the solution?
in

windows c#

its declare:

GuiSession.FocusChanged += GuiSession_FocusChange;

private static void GuiSession_FocusChange(GuiSession Session, GuiVComponent NewFocusedControl) { .... }
Thanks! it's urgent...

entry.title: Re: SAP’s Incident Solution Matching Integration in SAP for Me Further Improves Support Experience
entry.content: The article has been updated with the ‘Get Support’ application in SAP for Me.

entry.title: Re: Questions Regarding SAP Companion for Desktop
entry.content:
Hi,

Just to add to Dirk's response to your questions, you can find details about how to implement SAP Companion for Desktop in this document.  You are likely to have to log into help.sap.com to be able to access the document but it does contain details about how to deploy SAP Companion for Desktop - both the Cloud on On Premise versions.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion question mark missing in Manager
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

If the SAP Companion is still appearing for all other users and has only disappeared for you, I suspect that the issue is browser related.  Given that everyone is accessing the same SAP Companion configuration and they can see it but you cannot, the issue has to be related to your user account or browser.  Just make sure that your user Role has been added to the Workarea permissions, if you have setup SAP Companion to display custom content, and make sure that you are using the same browser as your colleagues.  Also, try clearing your browser cache and see if that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Cost estimate not distributing expenses
entry.content:
When checking the analysis step for a costing run (Material Cost Estimate), we can only see the price, I can't see the expense from the person, machine... 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cost estimate not distributing expenses
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to check the Cost Estimation by expenses (Machine Time, Personnel Time...), you can change the view to 'Cost Components' under the Costs tab of the Cost Estimate.


You can also refer to below documentation regarding Itemization / Cost Components:

Itemization

Cost Components 


Best Reagrds,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Can you convert an Enable Now Web Recording into Mp4
entry.content:
Hi David,

Yes, you can generate an MP4 video for your Simulation.  To do this:

1. Open the Simulation in Producer
2. Select Tools > Generate Video
3. Specify the settings that you want to use for the generated video.  I have found that some authors are experiencing issues generating videos recently but the following set of settings works
4. Click Generate Video

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to create the variant with dynamic selections usi...
entry.content: Thank you for all replies. I got the solution, I used variant rs_change_created_variant Function module and passed values to free selection value table to save the values in dynamic selections of variant .

entry.title: Re: Error received when exporting report to pdf using vb.net
entry.content:
This looks wrong:

"c:temp\100000026")

Should be:

c:\temp\1000000026

You are missing the "\"

Plus you need a file name extension:

rpt.ExportToDisk(ExportFormatType.PortableDocFormat, "c:\temp\1000000026.pdf");

You also need permission to export to C:\temp folder

entry.title: Can the higher level position update on position edit the existing record in incumbents Job Info
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When the higher level position is updated on position, its standard behavior that it will create a new record on incumbents job info for supervisor change.

Is there a way to make the system not create a new record but edit/update the existing record on incumbents job info? Can the behavior be tweaked such that a new record is not created on job info?

Thank you.

entry.title: In S/4 Hana Cloud, pub ed.,in Asset account. we get 3 deprec areas. How to have more?
entry.content:
In S/4 Hana Cloud, pub ed.,in Asset account. we get 3 depreciation areas. How to have more?

we get 1-Book Deprctn, 15-Local Tax and 32-IFRS, but we wanted to have others for free revaluations and specific historical revaluation...to be incluided in legal reporting requirements.

Is there any way to add other depreciation areas for information and legal reporting purposes?

entry.title: Re: Controlling the Visibility of SAP Enable Now and SAP Companion Content
entry.content:
Hi Karen,

You can access information about managing user accounts in this video.  It's pretty easy to do, you may not want to go through the video because there is quite a lot of other content in the video, so if you want to try without watching the video, you should:

1. Open SAP Enable Now Manager with an Administrator user account.  You must be an Administrator
2. Select Administration > Users
3. Search for and open the user account that you want to assign User Roles to.  Clicking on a user account will open it
4. Open the User Roles drop down list and click the checkbox in front of all of the Roles to be assigned to the user
5. Click OK

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: A function in Webi which gives the position of specif...
entry.content:
use the example/link I already gave you in your last question
to solve this with nested variables !

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 not retrieving databases ... dri...
entry.content:
Also, for the .NET application go here to get the latest SP 35 CR for VS:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Install the EXE, right click and select Run As Administrator to provide permissions to register all components etc. on your Development PC.

Note there is a 32 bit installer for VS 2010->2019 and a 64 bit installer for VS 2022.

Don't install the MSI packages separately, the VS install does this for you, at the end of the installer do select the 32/64 bit runtime, VS needs both installed.

For distribution include the MSI package for your platform, x86/x64, with your install package or manually install them under an Admin account, same permissions required.

Once you update each report using the info provided by Jamie your reports should run fine, note that if you are going to use TLS 1.2 you must update the reports with a supported MS Client. You can't replace the Client at runtime.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content:
Getting tons of build errors on Android (haven't tried iOS or web):

Runtime version: 4.9.201; AB version: 2.1.13{
  "stack": "SyntaxError: Unexpected token a in JSON at position 0\n    at JSON.parse (<anonymous>)\n    at Asset.decrypt (file:///usr/local/lib/node_modules/@sapappgyver/orchestra-builder-npm/dist/src/orchestra-builder/models/encryptedAsset.js:76:53)",
  "message": "Unexpected token a in JSON at position 0"
}

entry.title: Re: Email Inbound scenario with office 365 not working
entry.content:
Dear Ashwin2,

Below Note and KBA might be helpful.
455140 - Configuration of e-mail, fax, paging/SMS via SMTP
3378547 - Emails are not received on SOIN

By the way, I think you've selected the wrong tags when creating this thread as your question is more related to the Communication Service (BC-SRV-COM) area. So if above didn't help you to resolve the issue, it might be better to create a new thread with the tags related to Communication Services: Mail, Fax, SMS, Telephony.

Best regards,
Claudia

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content:
I did the same - I updated all the marketplace that I had installed in my app and the login page lost all the customizations and all the flows.  Fortunately, I had a backup and it was rather easy to re-apply the customizations and all the flows.  (It would have been even better if I could copy elements and flows between projects).

I still can't get anything to App Store Connect because of a missing string.

entry.title: How to assign system Owner role to a service account?
entry.content:
How to assign the System Owner role to a service account, not nominal.
What do I need to do?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to assign system Owner role to a service account?
entry.content:
Hello, 

The System Owner must be a user in Datasphere.
Refer to Transfer the System Owner Role. 
If you have a user based on service account email, it should work.

Regards,
SAP Support

Chakravarthi Ps

Please help resolve @MaiaraEllwanger

entry.title: RAP APP : I cannot upload attachment when its name is Arabic on on-promise system
entry.content:
In my Rap app I cannot upload attachment when its name is Arabic on on-promise system 

but it works when its name is English 

Error : "File upload failed: Failed to execute 'setRequestHeader' String contains non ISO-8859-1 code point"

Can any one help me ?

entry.title: JCo IDoc send is waiting for IDoc to complete processing
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a client that has a IDoc that is set to Trigger Immediately and with some of their large IDocs the processing can take more than 20 minutes. We send the IDocs to SAP with Jco 3.1.8 and the IDoc 3.1.3 library and whenever we have a large IDoc we experience that the JCoIDoc.send method is blocked until processing in SAP has finished.
I was always told that IDoc is asynchronous and now I am wondering what we are doing wrong.
We have suggested to the customer that he changes the processing to `Trigger by background program` but that is not an option to him. He still thinks that we should be able to continue processing on our end with the current settings.

entry.title: Re: Re-running Eligibility Mid Compensation Cycle
entry.content: Thank you so much for your respose @xavierlegarrec ! I really appreciate it.

entry.title: Re: Warning message when deleting dependent information r...
entry.content:
Hi Suraj,

Have you found a solution for this?

I am facing the exact same requirement but haven't found a suitable solution

entry.title: Re: Content Server and Rise with SAP, private edition
entry.content: We have same requirement, any reply?

entry.title: Export/Import of Fiori app variants
entry.content:
Hi.

Is there the ability to export/import an app variant to another client?

We are currently creating a development client and a test client.
When creating an app variant with UI adaptation, I think it is necessary to launch the screen.
I consider the creation of the app variant itself to be a development task,
However, there is a pattern where screen activation itself is not possible without a test client because the data does not exist.
I think the only way to do this is to create the app variant on the test client, but I would like to export it, import it to the development client, and then put it on the normal development process.

We have been told by our own experts that the above is possible with the screen variant/transaction variant.
I would like to determine if the same is feasible with the Fiori app variant.

----------

アプリバリアントを別のクライアントにエクスポート/インポートを行う機能は有りますでしょうか？

現在開発用のクライアントとテスト用のクライアントを作成しております。
アプリバリアントをUI適応にて作成する場合、画面起動が必要になるかと思います。
アプリバリアントの作成自体は開発作業と捉えているのですが、
テスト用のクライアントでないとデータが存在しないため画面起動自体が出来ないパターンが有ります。
そのためアプリバリアントをテスト用クライアントにて作成するしかないかとは思いますが、そこで作成したものをエクスポートして開発用クライアントにインポートして、通常の開発プロセスに載せたいと考えています。

画面バリアント/トランザクションバリアントでは上記が可能と自社の有識者から聞いております。
Fioriのアプリバリアントでも同様のことが実現可能か判断したく。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Export/Import of Fiori app variants
entry.content:
Fiori 画面上のバリアントについては下記のドキュメントに説明がございます。

3419226 - How to transport Fiori app Variant from one client/system to another client/system?  

How to Transport KPI Tile Application Step-by-Step Guide

ご確認ください。

entry.title: Re: WBS Report for the Opex Project
entry.content:
Use  Project Cost Report - Overview

 
App ID F2513
 
Then click on View details for the line items.

entry.title: Re: CNMASSSTATUS. User Status are not made.
entry.content: Try making the User Status Profile change first and save, then make the User Status changes.

entry.title: Re: Power BI Template Connection
entry.content: Hi Shane, i've checked but the url is correct. I've found that the error is originating from the Record Report table in Power BI. (screenshot updated in the post) Other tables are all working fine. No idea what is causing the issue for this particular workarea.

entry.title: One story report for Goals, Activities, and Achievements
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our customer would like to view all goals, activities, and achievements in a single report.

In our customer's case, when employees create goals, activities and achievements, they can choose to link them together or create them without linking (standalone).

In this situation, HR admin would like to view all employees' all goals, activities, and achievements in a single report regardless of linking.

In an attempt to meet the customer's requirements, we have tried to create a canvas, story, and table reports, but failed to extract all the desired data as per the customer's needs. 

Is there anyone who can provide insights on whether it is feasible to create a report that meets the customer's requirements?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: i5Chart with , separated number format value
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using MII 15.1 version i5Charts. Currently it is showing values in BAR charts - y axis as full digit format like 123456.78. But we want to show this value as in thousands - format like 123,456.78. If we are passing this value directly from query, chart is not plotting. 

How to achieve this in i5Chart?

Thanks,

Senthil

entry.title: How to get "DLT" status of production order component
entry.content:
How to get "DLT" status of production order component via API ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get "DLT" status of production order component
entry.content:
Use API : API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/A_ProductionOrderComponent_2 to fetch the field "MatlCompIsMarkedForDeletion" .
Online help :
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/a3198b0b4a5c4fc5895616576a7c7d9f.html?version=latest#:~:text=%3E%0A%09%09%09%3Cd-,%3AMatlCompIsMarkedForDeletion,-%3Efalse%3C/

entry.title: Changes to SAP Companion Conditions
entry.content:
I have noticed that there have been some changes to the SAP Companion Condition creation as now we can use a new object which is, Date for condition creation. However, I also noticed that what used to work no longer works.

In the screen shown below I am using the condition type Element and create a Condition that when the value is 21 then the tile will show up. It used to work before the update, now it displays an error icon as soon as I enter something in the value field. Any idea how to find further error messages. Is this a bug or have things changed?

 

 using "Value is" condition

 using "Value contains" condition

The app that I am using is the "Stock - Single Material" app where I want to set condition for the field Material.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Changes to SAP Companion Conditions
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you are correct, there is a new condition type - Date - that I will add in the next week or so.  It's a fantastic addition because it allows customers to limit access to a given date range.  This will obviously be great for information that is designed to highlight something new or has a limited life.

It's hard to know what is wrong in your instance, with limited information, but the only thing I can go on is the images that have been attached to the post.  In one of the images, I can see that the Material field is blank and the condition indicates that the content should only be shown if the Material value is set to 21.  So, in this case, the condition is failing, which I would expect it to do.  If you close the condition dialogue and set the Material value to 21, does that make the content appear?

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Crystal reports 2016 - Change report name at run time to use a formula field
entry.content:
Hi. Have customer reports for contracts, quotes, statements, etc...

Want the report filename to include the relevant document ID. (Such as Contract_ID, Quote_No, etc...)

I.e. Contract-12345.pdf, Quote-43564.pdf, Statement-54596.pdf 

Have created a formula field which has the file name I want to use - {@reportTitle}

'Loan Contract - ' + ToText({usp_Rpt_LoanAccountStatement;1.CONTRACT_ID}, 0, "")

Any suggestions on how to have the report file name change at run time?

entry.title: ECC 6.0 trans data to HANA Cloud (if data has Currencies, internal and external codes conversion...)
entry.content:
I would like to inquire about the methods and potential challenges I might encounter when transferring data from an on-premise ERP (ECC 6.0) to SAP HANA Cloud. Here are the approaches I currently know of and the associated issues:

  1. Direct data transfer using SLT, but how would currency or date conversion be handled?
  2. Using Integration Suite, there might be limitations in transferring excessively large datasets.
  3. If migrating from ECC 6.0 to S/4, can existing RFCs or APIs be directly integrated?

I'm unsure if there are solutions to these issues or if there are better methods for integrating ECC with S/4. Your assistance in addressing these queries would be greatly appreciated.

SAP Landscape Transformation SAP HANA Cloud  SAP ERP Central Component

entry.title: Hello, Is there a way to update the delivering plant of a sales order during VA02?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Is there a BAdI available in SAP Cloud that could help update the sales order's delivering plant?

I checked Business Add-Ins | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub and found nothing that could edit specifically the delivery plant at item level.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Change Azure database timezone
entry.content:
Questions regarding Azure database timezone setting for CCv2, though we understand that the default timezone of CCv2 Azure database is UTC, 

  • Is it possible to change the timezone of database to Japanese timezone from default setting?
  • If it is possible to change, does it require 're-creation' of the database like 'database collation change'?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change Azure database timezone
entry.content:
Per customer's business requirement, the db timezone can be easily changed in Cloud Portal. For detailed steps, please refer to KBA 3193329 - How to change timezone on cloud portal platform, and KBA 3207401 - How to verify the Timezone followed in CCV2 Database.

In addition, please pay attention to the following explanations quoted from the 'Caution' part of Help Page: Edit Your Environment

  • Changing the time zone of an environment results in all timestamp values being reinterpreted as if they were created in the new time zone. This could result in loss of Commerce data. For example, changing from UTC to EST would erroneously show an order placed at 11:22:33 UTC as being placed at 07:22:33, which is the EST equivalent of 11:22:33.
  • If you do change the time zone, it's highly recommended that you then redeploy builds with database initialization to re-create data using the new time zone.

entry.title: Re: Using XCO, how do I get a list of sub packages for a...
entry.content: Thanks for checking it out!

entry.title: Re: Using XCO, how do I get a list of sub packages for a...
entry.content:
If you want a working example based on Sandra's comment, here it is:

    DATA(lo_packages_name)   = xco_cp_abap_sql=>constraint->contains_pattern( 'ZMD%' ).
    DATA(lo_packages_filter) = xco_cp_abap_repository=>object_name->get_filter( lo_packages_name ).
    DATA(lo_packages)        = xco_cp_abap_repository=>objects->devc->where( it_filters = VALUE #( ( lo_packages_filter ) ) ).
    DATA(lt_packages)        = lo_packages->in( xco_cp_abap=>repository )->get( ).

    LOOP AT lt_packages INTO DATA(lo_package).
      IF lo_package->read( )-property-super_package->if_xco_ar_object~name->value <> 'ZMD_LOCAL'.
        DELETE lt_packages.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion question mark missing in Manager
entry.content:
Hi @ShaneLipke 

I have cleared the cache in my browser and even logged in the manager from different browser and the question mark is still missing.

entry.title: Re: Multiple backend sessions
entry.content:
Backend sessions are in S4 T.code SM66 as 7 RFC calls from Gateway

You are right, there are 7 backend sessions for one browser web preview

We haven't deployed the application

Reagrds

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion question mark missing in Manager
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

Have you updated the Server Settings to allow for customer-specific content in SAP Companion in Manager.  If you have, remove your URL from the following setting and save the change.  If this fixes the issue, the issue could be something to do with your access to the Workarea with the content.  If not, raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-CMP and get support involved so they can have a more detailed look.

 

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Performance of background jobs?
entry.content: Can anyone suggest if we can overcome this scenario using Odata and how to achieve that

entry.title: Re: How to find the relation between BNAME of USR DB tabl...
entry.content:
1. USE TCODE: PA20 maintain the relation between BNAME  and PERNR 

    infotype: 0105  subtype 0001

2.  Fetch data by SQL

SELECT PERNR,
       USRID
  FROM PA0105
  WHERE SUBTY = '0001' AND
        BEGDA <= @SY-datum AND
        ENDDA >= @SY-datum.

entry.title: 回复： The Journal Entry of Post B/S Reclassification have t...
entry.content: After the issue is fixed , it is OK

entry.title: Re: How to Plan Bom item before FERT for MTO scenario
entry.content: Hi, You need to have a requirement to initiate the production in advance, either from FG or SFG. If the requirement is known at SFG you can go for strategy 70 -planning at assembly level, where the consumption is driven by the production of the final assembly. It will be a mix of MTO and MTS.

entry.title: Re: To Bifurcate the values present in a column based on...
entry.content:
Thank-you for this however not able to reach to solution yet, there is still some challenge.
Please find the snippet below:

As the value and length of Tax_String changes, the variable is not giving correct result for all the Tax_String values.
If u see the third row above, I am not getting Tax_Code3_Value. Similarly we have different lengths of values for Tax_String.

Is there any way you can help.

What I was thinking is to apply IF condition on the number of commas in Tax_String for all my headers, however not able to find that how to count the number of commas in the Tax_String.
Is there any way to count the number of specific character in a string in Webi.

Thank-you in advance

entry.title: Liquidity Item did not display in the liquidity item hierarchy view.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

 

I have one question on liquidity management hierarchy view, where the liquidity items did not display correctly.

Below with steps i configure and maintain the master data.

Step 1 -

Configure the Liquidity Items

Step 2 

Maintain the Define default Liquidity Items - For G/L Account

Step 3

Maintain Global Hierarchy - Liquidity Item Hierarchy

Post one FB70 with correct G/L Account. In this case i use 42000500 G/L Account (Cancellation)

 

The issue is when i execute the cash flow analyzer and choose the Liquidity Item Hierarchy created in step 3, the amount did not appear in the correct node. However, the invoice is appeared under Not Assigned node. 

 

Kindly help how to make sure the invoice is display in the correct nodes.

 

@cash management expert

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Liquidity Risk Management FIN Cash Management

entry.title: Re: Changes to SAP Companion Conditions
entry.content: Thanks for the suggest. Looks like I would like to set the value as per the condition I want to set, otherwise the Condition failed icon will show up. Thanks again

entry.title: How to give solving priority to calculated measure over account formula in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello,

I've a calculation (Margin %) that is not performing as expected at parent level (red value):

 

The result is being displayed in a calculated measure (at story level) Amount_A+B, which is simply the sum of Amount_A and Amount_B measures. In the other hand, the Margin % it's a formula account. What it's happening it's that in a first step the account formula it's being calculated, and in the second step the sum of the measures is beign performed, obtaining the wrong result. I guess if I change the calculation order (first the sum of measures, then the account formula) it would work well.

 

I've tried changing the structure priority in the model preference, to give priority to measures, but that doesn't affect the result.

Is there something am I missing here?

Thanks in advance.

What I was thinking is to apply IF condition on the number of commas in Tax_String for all my headers, however not able to find that how to count the number of commas in the Tax_String.
Is there any way to count the number of specific character in a string in Webi.

Thank-you in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content:
Hello Vishnu, Apologies for the late reply. We would be very happy if you could join us for the event. Kindly let us know how you want to be part of the event. Speaker/ volunteer/ Participant? 

Thank you for showing interest in the event. 

Best Regards

Moumita

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024 - Registrations are open now!!
entry.content:
Curious about SAP Inside Track?

SAP Inside Track is an informal, community-driven event where SAP professionals, developers, consultants, architects, and leaders come together to share their knowledge and insights on various SAP-related topics, a grassroots initiative, organized by SAP Community members.
Know more about SAP Inside Track Here!

Event Details

Date: Apr 27th, 2024
Time: 9 AM – 6 PM IST
Venue: HFJF+XMC, Canal Bank Rd, DG Block(Newtown), Action Area I, Newtown, New Town, West Bengal 700156 

Registration

Registration is now open and only register if you are planning to attend IN-PERSON.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdiKVTViw8c7TyqtVFaOd_IrfOS-1XLWx0a-nO8eGoHfY5B1w/viewform

Please note: It's an in-person event and only register if you are planning to come.

Agenda

We've planned an exciting agenda for the event covering a range of SAP Technologies like SAP BTP, Concur, UX, SAP S/4HANA, AI with SAP, and more!. AI has exploded into public prominence in the past few months and at SAP Inside Track Kolkata, we wanted the community to get updated on how AI plays a bigger role in all the SAP products. So this time many of our sessions will have  AI part of it. Check out this below blog post for more details.

Call for Speakers

SAP enthusiasts and experts, we are calling for speakers who could share their unique insights and experiences. Refer to the below blog post and enroll yourself as a speaker for the event!

https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogworkflowpage/blog-id/kolkatablog-board/article-id/45?prePageCrumb=BlogDashboardPage

SAP Inside Track Kolkata Team

We are expecting around 500 attendees and 20+ sessions in 4 different tracks. All of this can only be accomplished with the huge effort of the volunteers. Thanks to all the organizers, content team and volunteers who are supporting this event (In no specific order).

Rahul Agarwal, Jeetndar Singh Yadav, Soham Das, Sohom Bhattayacharya, Avnikanth Singh, Nandini Das, Arghadeep Kar

Be a part of the Kolkata SAP Community

Here's an invite for SAP enthusiasts based in or around Kolkata/around to become a part of the thriving Kolkata SAP Community Group. Discuss, share, and collaborate with fellow SAP enthusiasts. Click below to join.

https://community.sap.com/t5/kolkata/gh-p/kolkata

 

Thanks,
SAP Inside Track Kolkata Team

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi community members! It is great to meet and discuss in this group. I am from Bangalore.

entry.title: Call for Speakers – SAP Inside Track Kolkata, 27th Apil 2024
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are excited to announce that speaker registration is now open for the much-awaited SAP Inside Track Kolkata on 27th April, 2024.

We are looking for speakers to share their insights, knowledge, and experiences with the SAP Community.

If you want to share your knowledge with the community, we encourage you to apply as a speaker. Not only it gives an opportunity to showcase your work, but speaking at the event can provide valuable networking opportunities and exposure for your business, organization, or yourself.

Topics

The only criterion is that the topic should be related to SAP.

Some of the tracks that we are encouraging you to present on but not limited to are:

SAP Application Development using Pro Code and Low Code, SAP BTP,  AI with SAP and Automation, SAP S/4HANA and other Cloud Products, SAP Concur, SAP Fiori/UI5 & Design, Strategy & Design, Data & Analytics + Integration

As AI has exploded into public prominence in the past few months and at SAP Inside Track Kolkata, we wanted our SAP community to get updated on how AI plays a bigger role in all the SAP products. So do submit sessions on use cases where there is a mix of AI. Any new ideas are also most welcome.

Speaker Registration Link:

To apply, please fill out the below speaker registration form to submit your nominations.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeaZTeVwVbPX9wRP2TnKZlh9eDYBfrTmF1Yl4KXJWdk3wsXug/viewform

Note: This is an In-person Event and the Speaker is expected to be in Biswa Bangla Centre, Kolkata on 27th April, 2024.

Closing:

If you have any questions, please contact us at sapcommunitykolkata@gmail.com.
We look forward to reviewing your session submission and featuring your expertise at the event.
Please help spread the word about speaker registration by sharing this post with your network.

Also, for such latest event updates, don't forget to join our https://community.sap.com/t5/kolkata/gh-p/kolkata and follow us on https://www.linkedin.com/company/sap-inside-track-kolkata/ .

Cheers,
Soham,

SAP Inside Track Kolkata, Team.

  • SAP Managed Tags:
  • SAP Community

entry.title: Recurring Inspection lot - 1 lot across all LOCATIONS
entry.content:
Hi All,

I know this has been asked before and its not possible/recommended to change standard program BUT this looks like a request a lot of clients would have. Can you share your views on this.

 One Batch is stored in multiple Slocs ({Physically and in SAP). QA07 will create separate inspection lots.

Can we copy QA07 and generate 89 inspection lot instead of 09 ? or any other work around?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Kolkata - 2024
entry.content:
Announcing all the details that you need to know to join us for SAP Stammtisch- 2024.

Please Note:- This is an in-person event at Kolkata location. People who are registering, need to be available on the event day at the venue.

Who can join us ? SAP Enthusiasts who have registered with us on the given link, can join us on the day full of SAP discussions.

Registration Link: 

Selection will be based on first come first serve, separate e-mail will be sent confirming to the participants from community.

Agenda of SAP Stammtisch: - Local SAP community members meet ,Discussion about SIT 2024 (Speakers, Sponsor & new Topics that can help community members to learn , Network) ! Join us for SAP Stammtisch 2024—an opportunity for SAP Developers, Functional Consultants, Project Managers, and Architects to connect and share insights. Feel free to bring a friend or anyone else linked to SAP in some way.

Featuring enlightening sessions on:

1. SAP BTP & AI: Unleashing the power of SAP Business Technology Platform and Artificial Intelligence.

2. SAP FICO: Dive deep into Central Finance, Group Finance, and Revenue Accounting and Recognition (RAR).
3. ABAP on Cloud: Explore the possibilities of ABAP in the cloud environment.

In the second half, let's engage and discuss the exciting prospects of SAP Inside Track 2024. 🌐🤝

We will also be sharing insights on contribution in our upcoming community events. Your participation is key to shaping the vibrant future of our SAP community!

Looking forward to meet you all, and make a meaningful impact towards the SAP Community at Kolkata.

#SAPStammtisch2024 #SAPEvents #Community #Networking #Learing #sitKOL #sapbtp #abapcloud #Sapfico #centralfinance #RAR #groupfinance #sapcommunity

entry.title: To use variable name as field name
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I read the below thread but that goes with a structure and fieldcat methodology that will not suit my requirement. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/how-to-use-variable-as-fieldname/td-p/2696571

So, please consider this request and let us know your valuable solutions/comments.

My requirement is to use the variable names as a field name.

For ex: lv_zbatch , lv_zmatnr, lv_zauto_date are the variables which I want to use these as field names (like zbatch, zmatnr, zauto_date) instead of hard coded value or using text element values.

Currently, I declared using text-001 as field name but due to code review process, I have to avoid this and go with other way solution. 

Please note, I don't have any structure and these are local variables. 

Thanks in advance.

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Using Build Apps to Create a List Report with Charts ,Tables and Pagination
entry.content:
Great blog

We are using S4 Odata API and record/Totalcount is not working

Would be helpful if you could elaborate On below:

To control the availability of increment and decrement page buttons, the total number of items in the OData response must be determined. Achieving this involves an additional call to "Get Data Collection," which is connected to the OData integration, follows same filter logic and provides the total count.

May be adding some screen shots will help the members

Regards

MB

Lalith P

entry.title: Re: The /SALM/TRACEABILITY_REPORT
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: S4 HANA Cost Center Activity Rate Calculation Hybrid Approach
entry.content:
Before S4 HANA, during SAP ECC days, cost accountants usually would use the standard transaction codes such as KP26, and KP06 to load plan activity type dependent and independent data in terms of quantity (volume) and plan costs. Typically, a cost-center plan cycle would be something like as shown in Figure 1. This process diagram has simplified a few sub-processes such as planning of volume or Input Quantities for the cost centers/activity types that could be planned and transferred using the SAP long-term planning (LTP) or even through a manual upload. Nevertheless, the basic high-level steps remain as shown in Figure 1.

Figure 1: Typical SAP ECC Cost Center Planning

 

 

Currently, with S4 HANA (up to version 2022), there are a couple of new CO or managerial accounting planning tables that are built on the premise of in-memory processing. These tables are ACDOCP and ACCOSTRATE. Many of the Fiori plan versus actual comparison apps run based on these AC* tables. SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) also Integrates with these tables better. Additionally, the S4 HANA most powerful allocation tool i.e. universal allocation or manage allocation also uses these tables. Based on all these contexts, cost-center planning processes are designed around these tables. While following this approach, the cost center activity type-driven overhead allocations become problematic. Till the latest version of S4 HANA, the cost center activity type automatic rates calculation transactions or corresponding Fiori apps are still all original old school CO tables based. To address this type of limitation a hybrid approach can be adopted. Adopting such a hybrid approach will result in the best of both worlds based on the current system design. Figure 2 process flow summarizes the high-level system design.

Figure 2: New S4 HANA Hybrid Cost Center Activity Type Rate Automation

 

This hybrid approach circles around the following main steps:

  • First, the cost center and activity type volume or quantities are loaded to S4 CO tables using standard transaction codes such as KP26.
  • The cost center plan load can be performed using the Fiori app called “import financial Plan Data” – This app would take Excel or .csv file load which can be easily set up. This app would load data into the ACDOCP table.
  • During this process if any SKF (statistical Key Figures) would be necessary, then that would be an additional step to load the plan SKF data through the Fiori app “import Statistical Key Figure Plan Data.”
    1. Pre-requisites for this step would be to create SKF master data using transaction codes such as KK01.
    2. After the plan data is loaded into the Fiori app, an existing S4 transfer program can be used to transfer the plan SKF values from the FINSSKF table to the COSF table.

 

  • Next, the cost center plan data is transferred from ACDOCP to CO tables – This task could have been very time-consuming and expensive to develop but luckily S4 HANA comes with many standard transfer report programs that can be used without any changes to transfer plan data from ACDOCP table to CO.
    1. Three Transfer programs from AC tables to CO tables are available.
      1.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP (CO Activity Independent Data Transfer)
      2.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTOUT_2_ERP (Activity Type Dependent Data from S4 to CO)
      3.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_SKF_S4H_ERP (SKF plan data to CO)
  • Next, as the plan data now resides in CO tables, the rest of the cost center/activity type plan functions such as cost splitting among activity types or any plan reconciliation can be performed using the old school CO transactions such as KSS4.
  • Cost Center Activity type rate calculation would be run next using S4 transaction KSPI.
  • After this step, cost center plan data along with the activity type rates can be transferred back to ACDOCP, etc. S4HANA tables using the S4 delivered standard programs. As mentioned earlier, these programs would require very little customization to deploy in the existing S4 ecosystem
    1.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_ERP_2_S4H (CO plan data from CO tables to S4H)
    2.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTY_ERP_S4H (CO tables to ACCOSTRATE)

Figure 3 shows the First transfer program that moves the cost center plan data from the ACDOCP table to the CO table.

Figure 3 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP

 

Figure 4 shows the transfer program that moves the cost center/activity type dependent plan data from the ACDOCP table to the CO table.

Figure 4 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTOUT_2_ERP

 

Figure 5 shows the Statistical Key Figure (SKF) plan data transfer from the FINSSKF table to the COSR table.

Figure 5 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_SKF_S4H_ERP

 

Figure 6 shows the transfer program that moves the cost center/activity type plan data from the CO table to ACDOCP.

Figure 6 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTOUT_2_ERP

 

Figure 7 shows the transfer program that moves the cost center/activity type plan rates data from the CO tables to ACDOCP.

Figure 7 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTY_ERP_S4H

 

In conclusion, I would like to mention that using the above-suggested hybrid approach, the old-school CO/ERP transactions could be very well integrated with the modern-day S4 transactions/app. This also offers scalability to Integrate the planning with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

entry.title: Re: Tracker Record Creation using “Benefit Eligibility Date Configuration Object” for Benefits, whos
entry.content: Great. Keep going

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Gerhard,

advanced intercompany sales in Intercompany Sales,

supplier invoice(Miro)  will be automatically created when IV2 billing is established,but for the miro heaer reference field we need to enter invoice number , not the standard billing number , so we want to create miro by manually.

Is it possible to disconnect miro for advanced intercompany sales in SAP S/4HANA?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年07月 – 2023年09月
entry.content:
本文主要收集了与集成扩展相关的常见问题(2023年07月 – 2023年09月)，按照主要问询对象API，CDS View，CPI，自定义字段和逻辑以及集成迁移相关对常见问题进行了大致的分类。每一类对象下又进行了问题性质的分类，例如：功能缺失，操作和实施以及配置相关问题等。客户可以点击下方链接查看到相关问题。

Contents

API

  • 功能缺失相关问题
  • 操作和实施相关问题

CDS View

  • 功能缺失相关问题
  • 操作和实施相关问题

自定义字段和逻辑

  • 功能缺失相关问题
  • 操作和实施相关问题

集成相关

  • 操作和实施相关问题

迁移相关

  • 操作和实施相关问题

 

 API

功能缺失相关问题

 

  • 问题：客户咨询是否有API可以支持采购订单外部审批的。

解答：采购订单需要在我的收件箱里被审批。审批者需要检查采购订单的必要详细信息，才能决定是批准还是拒绝。如果确实需要这样的功能，可以通过Customer Influence Portal来提交新的请求。

 

  • 问题：外部WMS系统通过API API_INSPECTIONLOT_SRV集成到S4HC系统。当通过移动类型103对采购订单做收货动作的时候，检验批被创建。客户希望创建batch number，然后更新到检验批上面。客户觉得在前台GUI QA02是可以更新batch number，但是API做不到。

解答：现在通过API API_INSPECTIONLOT_SRV来更新batch的时候会报错QA556 "Update for field BATCH not supported by this function"。目前，这个功能在API里面不支持。

 

操作和实施相关问题

 

  • 问题：客户调用接口API_PURCHASEREQ_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurchaseRequisitionItem?$format=json，会抛出500 error。但是如果移掉参数$format=json就不会有问题。

解答：抛出的错误"TOO_LARGE_BODY"是因为HTTP response太大，相关的参数是（icm/HTTP/max_request size MB），建议加上参数$top来限制返回的数量，例如A_PurchaseRequisitionItem?$format=json&$top=100。

具体可参见Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003366726。

 

  • 问题：客户想要下载App 维护零税申报里的数据，想要问有没有相关的API或者CDS？

App地址是https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('IDTW_EXP_ZERO_TAX')/S31

解答：没有找到这个App相关的CDS或者API可以公布给客户。

 

  • 问题：客户调用交货单API出错，链接如下：

https://myxx.saps4hanacloud.cn:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV

解答：正确的API调用的URL都应该在hostname后面包含api后缀，正确的链接大致如下：https://my123456-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_XYZ_SRV

 

 

CDS View

操作和实施相关问题

 

  • 问题：客户调用自定义CDS读取数据，在测试系统中数据读取正常，但是在生产系统中数据显示重复。

解答：需要重新检查扩展数据源的join条件。比如扩展数据源A有键值A1和A2，但是A在与主数据源X组成join条件时，只写了X1=A1，没有包括A2。这会导致结果是1:n，而不是1:1。

 

  • 问题：为什么CDS视图中的自定义字段没有显示最新的值？

解答：需要留意视图中字段取数逻辑。确保视图取的数据为更新表单中自定义字段。

 

  • 问题：创建自定义 CDS 报表时，无论是标准 CDS、多维数据集、维度、主要数据源还是关联数据源，客户都无法使用标准 CDS：I_ GoodsMovementDocumentDEX，并且未找到合适的替换 CDS。

解答：按“建议的数据源”过滤搜索结果。要查看其他数据源，请单击显示过滤器，然后将建议的数据源的过滤器设置为“否”。

 

  • 问题：客户在之前的CDS视图中有使用I_AccountingDocumentJournal作主数据源，但现在在创建新的自定义CDS视图时，却不可以选择I_AccountingDocumentJournal作为主数据源。

解答：CDS 视图可用于许多不同的场景。

I_AccountingDocumentJournal 已标识为要用作Analytical Provider，而不是 CDS 建模数据源。这意味着客户可以在该视图之上构建自定义 CDS 查询，但不能构建自定义 CDS。

如果要基于会计凭证项目构建自定义 CDS，则可以改用 CSD I_JournalEntryItem。它将提供与 I_AccountingDocumentJournal 相同的信息，旨在用作自定义 CDS 的主要数据源。

此外，之前建好的自定义 CDS 视图不会受特征引入的影响。

 

  • 问题：在生产系统中传输 CDS 视图后，cds任务优先级显示不正确，在 P 系统中仍显示为“高”。

解答：测试系统/定制租户中自定义 CDS 视图的返工任务直接在发布流程中统计。而在生产系统中，返工任务不会立即更新状态，会由每周日晚上进行重复作业。

 

  • 问题：发布自定义 CDS 视图 时出错。“已忽略字段X 的关联：字段X的关联不一致”

解答：如果报错字段没有外键或文本关联，请添加指向目标视图的关联。如果存在关联，请调整关联。

 

 

自定义字段和逻辑

操作和实施相关问题

  • 问题：客户需要修改自定义逻辑中的某些字段，单击编辑，提示错误，不允许编辑。

解答：在编辑使用已弃用的自定义逻辑应用创建的自定义逻辑之前，需要使用新应用将其发布。

在找到“打开代码编辑器”按钮的屏幕中，可以看到旁边有一个发布按钮。请先选择发布自定义逻辑。

 

集成相关

操作和实施相关问题

  • 问题：第三方系统在调用API API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV做报工操作的时候，提示“返回信息为:CSRF token validation failed”。虽然提示这个信息，但存在发生物料货物移动，比如会执行工序0010,0020,0030成功，但是0040不成功，如果重复执行 会重复报工 重复料耗。

解答：建议客户每次deregister token，然后在下一次使用前再次拿新的token。可参考API Call的Best Practice Note：https://me.sap.com/notes/3201227

 

  • 问题：客户通过 https://my-api.s4hana.sapcloud.cn/sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetchange 通过接口修改固定资产信息时，当例程数据、时间相关数据和评估数据多次异步传输时，可能会导致某些数据值不会被修改。但是，在监控仪表盘中，可以看到接口已成功接收并且存在数据。如果只是单个异步值传输和单独的时间传输，则不会出现问题。

解答：请注意，使用 API 固定资产 - 更改（异步） 时，无法在同一 SOAP 请求中多次更改同一固定资产。

请参阅帮助文档链接：https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/5bcca49998834de2b5533c36602e52a2/aa0664be3f3a45179d23675ba8c17103.html#constraints

 

迁移相关

操作和实施相关问题

  • 问题：客户使用迁移对象“产品 - 按新组织级别扩展现有记录”导入数据时，发生错误“上载文件中缺少自定义属性 LANGUAGE”。

解答：检查客户的源文件，发现文件里包含如下信息

<Font ss:FontName="宋体" x:CharSet="134" ss:Size="12" ss:Color="#000000"/>

在黏贴数据时，要只贴值，不能把格式给拷贝到导入文件中。具体可参见以下Note：

https://me.sap.com/notes/3350877/E

https://me.sap.com/notes/2692715/E

 

 

以上为本次分享的全部内容。若想要了解往期更多有关集成扩展的常问问题，可以点击下方链接进行查看：

 

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年01月 – 2022年03月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年04月 – 2022年06月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年07月 – 2022年09月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年10月 – 2022年12月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年01月 – 2023年03月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年04月 – 2023年06月)：click here.

entry.title: Re: Bug in Access Control SP23?
entry.content:
Novella,

Please check the Note:
3427859 - "Unknown error during login" in centralized EAM

Regards,
Raj
